lessons.title: Characteristics and Indicia of a Crime
lessons.description: The core principle is this: a crime is a public wrong. Not a private wrong — a public one. When someone commits a crime, it is not just an injury to the victim. It is an injury to the entire community.

lessons.title: Classification of Criminal Offences
lessons.description: At common law — before statute changed things — criminal offences were divided into three categories.
